instincts.trigger: When updating profile, resume, project, or contact content in this portfolio
instincts.action: Edit the source data module in `src/data/` first and keep components focused on rendering that data.

instincts.trigger: When changing navigation, section layout, or visual styling
instincts.action: Validate both mobile and desktop behavior together with light and dark theme states before considering the change complete.

instincts.trigger: When adding viewport-dependent UI behavior in React
instincts.action: Use component-local state plus `matchMedia` inside `useEffect`, including a fallback for older listener APIs if the file already follows that pattern.

instincts.trigger: When writing async UI flows like the contact form or theme persistence
instincts.action: Keep side effects explicit, clear stale status before retry, and show loading or error state instead of silently failing.

instincts.trigger: When adding external links or icon-only actions
instincts.action: Use `rel="noopener noreferrer"` for new-tab links and add an `aria-label` for icon-only controls.

instincts.trigger: When finishing a non-trivial repo change
instincts.action: Run `npm run lint` and `npm run build` because this project has no configured test runner.

instincts.trigger: When preparing a commit in this repository
instincts.action: Prefer a descriptive conventional-style subject such as `feat:`, `style:`, or `chore:` and avoid vague one-word summaries.
